subcodes.first_line: The illustrious letter of His Holiness, which causeth the growth of the life-giving forces of the world, hath arrived. Growth was attained and joy became manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه نامی آنحضرت که سبب نمو قواهای نامیه عالم است رسید نمو حاصل فرح مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
